name: Product Recommendations
description: Displays product recommendations. Automatically reads product from context when available on product pages.

attribute_definition_groups.name: Product Recommendations
attribute_definition_groups.description: Displays product recommendations. Automatically reads product from context when available on product pages.

attribute_definitions.name: Recommender Name
attribute_definitions.description: Unique identifier for the Einstein recommender

attribute_definitions.name: Recommender Title
attribute_definitions.description: Display title for the recommendation section

attribute_definitions.name: Recommender Type
attribute_definitions.description: Type of recommendation request. Defaults to "recommender" for standard recommenders. Use "zone" only for zone-based recommendations.
